list.title: My Orders
list.subtitle: Manage and track all your orders
list.emptyAllDesc: When you place or receive an order, it will appear here.
list.emptyActiveDesc: You don't have any orders in progress right now.
list.emptyCompletedDesc: Orders you've finished will show up here.
list.errorDesc: Something went wrong. Please check your connection and try again.
list.commentPlaceholder: e.g. great work, done on time
list.photosHint: Up to {{max}} images · JPEG or PNG recommended · {{mb}} MB max each · upload may take a moment
list.photoTooLarge: “{{name}}” is over {{mb}} MB — choose a smaller image.

card.bannerPayBody: The provider accepted this order. Complete payment to lock in the booking and move forward.
card.bannerConfirmBody: Review the outcome and confirm so the order can be closed and reviewed.
card.bannerNewBody: Review the details and accept if you can take this job, or reject with a short reason.
card.bannerProgressBody: When the service is finished, mark the order as done so the customer can confirm.
card.bannerReviewedBody: You have already submitted a review for this order.

create.title: Create Order
create.subtitle: Enter location, schedule, and agreed price
create.chatHint: Make sure you have agreed on all details with the provider in chat before creating the order.
create.orderPhotosHint: Photos of the job site or details for the provider
create.errServiceIdNum: Service ID must be a positive number
create.errProviderIdNum: Provider ID must be a positive number
create.errPriceNum: Price must be a positive number
create.createFailedRetry: Failed to create order. Please try again.

detail.errorBody: We couldn't load this order. Please check your connection and try again.
detail.invalidBody: The order ID in the URL is not valid.
detail.yourCustomerId: Your customer ID on this order:
detail.customerChatHint: Open chat to coordinate timing and visit details with the customer.
detail.noMapCoordsHint: Address text is still shown above when available.
detail.communicationHint: Coordinate timing, access, or scope with the {{party}} before work starts.
detail.disputeHint: Describe what went wrong. This will be sent with your dispute for our team to review.
detail.disputePlaceholder: What is the problem with this order?
detail.disputeEvidenceHint: Screenshots or photos that support your dispute
detail.disputeMinLength: Please describe the problem in at least 10 characters.
detail.disputeFailed: Could not submit dispute. Try again or contact support.

pending_provider_acceptance.customer: Waiting for the provider to review and accept your order.
pending_provider_acceptance.provider: You have a new order request. Please accept or reject it.
pending_provider_acceptance.admin: Order is waiting for the provider to accept.

pending_payment.customer: The provider accepted your order. Please complete the payment to proceed.
pending_payment.provider: Order accepted. Waiting for the customer to complete payment.

pending_customer_confirmation.customer: The provider has marked this order as done. Please review and confirm completion.
pending_customer_confirmation.provider: You've marked this order as complete. Waiting for customer confirmation.

in_progress.customer: The provider is currently working on your order.
in_progress.provider: This order is in progress. Mark it as completed when done.

completed.customer: This order has been completed successfully.
completed.provider: This order has been completed successfully.

reviewed.customer: You have already submitted a review for this order.
reviewed.provider: The customer has submitted a review for this order.
reviewed.admin: This order has been reviewed by the customer.

rejected_by_provider.customer: The provider has rejected this order.
rejected_by_provider.admin: This order was rejected by the provider.

disputed.customer: A dispute has been raised for this order. Our team is reviewing it.
disputed.provider: A dispute has been raised for this order. Our team is reviewing it.
disputed.admin: This order is under dispute review.

summary.title: Order Summary
summary.terms: By creating this order, you agree to the platform terms. The provider will be notified to accept.

payment.title: Pay for order
payment.intro: Enter your card details. Payment is processed securely by Stripe.
payment.testCardHint: Test card: 4242 4242 4242 4242, any future date, any CVC.
payment.successBody: Your payment was accepted. The order status will update shortly.
payment.successPendingSync: Status is still updating — refresh the page in a moment if needed.
payment.errStripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLIC_KEY.
payment.errStripeInvalidKey: Invalid Stripe key: use the publishable key (pk_test_... or pk_live_...), not the secret key (sk_...).
payment.errInitFailed: Could not start payment. Please try again.
payment.errCardMissing: Card form is not ready. Please wait and try again.
payment.errPaymentFailed: Payment failed. Check your card details and try again.
